name: AUX Resources Corporation
summary: AUX Resources Corporation engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for gold and silver properties. It holds interests in the Georgia project covering 7,936 hectares; American Creek project that covers 3,024 hectares; Bear Pass project covering 6,400 hectares; Lower Bear project covering 3,836 hectares; Tide North project covering 2,204 hectares located in Stewart gold camp in the Golden Triangle region of northwest British Columbia; and Independence and Silver Crown properties that cover an area of 2,647 hectares located in Stewart, British Colombia. The company was formerly known as Auramex Resource Corp. and changed its name to AUX Resources Corporation in July 2020. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
